column8: Sub-rounded Cobbles and Gravels of metamorphic rock and quartz with some brown silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey, fine to coarse grained, moderately to slightly decomposed GRANITE. Closely to moderately jointed with widely to medium spaced and closely to very closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar joints, dipping 10 degrees, 20 degrees, 80 degrees, 85 degrees.
